title: Use a flat xref table for FTR dependencies
rationale: Flat strings round-trip cleanly through the current JSON and ODS tooling.

title: Keep the project_memory workspace pinned to the current package release
rationale: Document the current repo pin as spreadsheet-handling==0.2.0 for the next release cycle.

title: Visible spreadsheet payload is a string substrate; typing is opt-in metadata
rationale: Closed the 0.2 release-readiness cutline gate by architectural decision rather than code: both backend parsers already stringify cell payload at the table-block boundary, so the string contract is a chosen narrowness, not forced ignorance. Typing stays opt-in via the registry-declared cell_codecs family. Three non-disruptive migration paths and five revisit criteria are recorded in the ADR.
